title: Viral Sequencing, from Gunk to Graph (Two-step, strand-switching)
author: David A Eccles
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bebujanw

steps.title: Prepare a 1
steps.instruction: Prepare a 1.5 mL centrifuge tube with heated lysis buffer and a cellulose disc

steps.title: Add 500 µL lysis / RNAse...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL lysis / RNAse inactivation buffer ( Twitter reference ) to 1.5ml centrifuge tube: 10 millimolar (mM), Tris 10 millimolar (mM), EDTA 0.5 % volume, SDS 150 millimolar (mM), NaCl OR 500 µL extraction buffer #2 (see paper ): 800 millimolar (mM), guanidine hydrochloride 50 millimolar (mM), Tris [pH 8] 0.5 % volume, Triton X100 1 % volume, Tween-20

steps.title: Add a 3 mm, diameter punched...
steps.instruction: Add a 3 mm, diameter punched disc from Whatman #1 filter paper (see paper )

steps.title: Preheat 1
steps.instruction: Preheat 1.5 mL tube to 60 °C

steps.title: Collect sample using a sterile polystyrene...
steps.instruction: Collect sample using a sterile polystyrene swab with a 30mm breakpoint (e.g. Puritan 25-3606-U; PurFlock Ultra 6" Sterile Elongated Flock Swab w/Polystryene Handle, 30mm Breakpoint ).

steps.title: Transfer disc to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer disc to a new 1.5 mL tube containing 200 µL wash buffer using a pipette tip to remove contaminants: 10 millimolar (mM), Tris [pH 8.0] 0.1 % volume, Tween-20

steps.title: Incubate tube at Room temperature for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Incubate tube at Room temperature for 00:01:00

steps.title: Transfer disc to a new 200...
steps.instruction: Transfer disc to a new 200 µL PCR tube using a pipette tip

steps.title: Add the following additional components into...
steps.instruction: Add the following additional components into the 200 µL PCR tube (see the Nanopore protocol for Sequence-specific cDNA-PCR Sequencing (SQK-PCS109) ) in a 11 µL reaction: 1 µL x 2 micromolar (µM), reverse primers μl 1 µL x 10 millimolar (mM), dNTPs 9 µL, RNAse-free water Reverse primers should be prefixed with sample-specific barcode sequences (if used) and the ONT reverse anchor sequence, i.e. [5' - ACTTGCCTGTCGCTCTATCTTC - [barcode] - [sequence-specific] - 3'] A potential primer pool are the reverse/right ARCTIC primers (and amplification control) with barcodes and ONT anchor sequences from here . An alternative protocol using both forward and reverse primers can be found here .

steps.title: Mix gently by flicking the tube and spin down 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Mix gently by flicking the tube and spin down 00:00:05

steps.title: Denature RNA and anneal primers at...
steps.instruction: Denature RNA and anneal primers at 65 °C for 00:05:00 and then snap cool on a pre-chilled freezer block for 00:01:00

steps.title: In a separate tube, mix together...
steps.instruction: In a separate tube, mix together the following in an 8 µL reaction: 4 µL 5X RT Buffer 1 µL RNAseOUT 1 µL Nuclease-free water 2 µL x 10 micromolar (µM) ONT Strand-switching primer (SSP)

steps.title: Mix gently by flicking the tube and spin down 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Mix gently by flicking the tube and spin down 00:00:05

steps.title: Add the strand-switching buffer to the...
steps.instruction: Add the strand-switching buffer to the snap-cooled, annealed RNA, mix by flicking the tube and spin down

steps.title: Incubate at 42 °C for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 42 °C for 00:02:00

steps.title: Add 1 µL of Maxima H...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of Maxima H Minus Reverse Transcriptase, to a total volume of 20 µL

steps.title: Mix gently by flicking the tube and spin down 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Mix gently by flicking the tube and spin down 00:00:05

steps.title: Incubate using the following protocol
steps.instruction: Incubate using the following protocol: %s %s

steps.title: In four new 200 µL PCR...
steps.instruction: In four new 200 µL PCR tubes, prepare the following reaction at Room temperature in a 50 µL reaction: 25 µL 2X Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity Master Mix 1.5 µL cDNA primer (cPRM) 18.5 µL Nuclease-free water 5 µL Reverse-transcribed cDNA from the previous step (pool, or single sample)

steps.title: Amplify using the following cycling conditions
steps.instruction: Amplify using the following cycling conditions: %s %s * Starting from viral RNA, the recommended starting point is 20 cycles - adjust this depending on experimental needs.

steps.title: Add 1 µL of NEB Exonuclease...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of NEB Exonuclease 1 (20 units) directly to each PCR tube to remove unextended primers. Mix by pipetting .

steps.title: Incubate the reaction at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction at 37 °C for 00:15:00 , followed by 80 °C for 00:15:00

steps.title: Run 1μl of amplified product on...
steps.instruction: Run 1μl of amplified product on a gel (or similar length-based QC device) to verify that amplified products exist at the expected length. Because this is a strand-switch protocol, there may be a smear of template DNA rather than specific bands.

steps.title: Add 160 µl of resuspended AMPure...
steps.instruction: Add 160 µl of resuspended AMPure XP beads to the 1.5 mL tube and mix by pipetting

steps.title: Incubate on a gentle agitator (e
steps.instruction: Incubate on a gentle agitator (e.g. hula mixer or rotator mixer) for 00:05:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Spin down 00:00:05 the sample and pellet on a magnet
steps.instruction: Spin down 00:00:05 the sample and pellet on a magnet. Keep the tube on the magnet, and pipette off the supernatant.

steps.title: Keep the tube on the magnet...
steps.instruction: Keep the tube on the magnet and wash the beads with 200 µL of freshly-prepared 70 % volume, ethanol without disturbing the pellet. Remove the ethanol using a pipette and discard.

steps.title: Repeat the previous step
steps.instruction: Repeat the previous step: wash with 200 µL 70 % volume, ethanol , and discard the ethanol / wash liquid.

steps.title: Spin down 00:00:05 and place the...
steps.instruction: Spin down 00:00:05 and place the tube back on the magnet. Pipette off any residual ethanol. Allow to dry for 00:00:30, [at most] but do not dry the pellet to the point of cracking (the magnetic beads should just start to lose their shiny sheen).

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnetic rack and resuspend pellet in 12 µL of Elution Buffer (EB).

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00

steps.title: Pellet beads on magnet 00:05:00 until...
steps.instruction: Pellet beads on magnet 00:05:00 until the eluate is clear and colourless

steps.title: While still on the magnet, carefully...
steps.instruction: While still on the magnet, carefully remove and retain 12 µL of eluate into a clean 1.5 mL Eppendorf DNA LoBind tube

steps.title: Quantify 1 µl of the amplified...
steps.instruction: Quantify 1 µl of the amplified cDNA library using the Quantus Fluorometer using the ONE dsDNA assay (see ncov 2019 sequencing protocol, step 16 )

steps.title: Add 1 µL of Rapid Adapter...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of Rapid Adapter (RAP) to the amplified cDNA library

steps.title: Mix by pipetting and spin down 00:00:05
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting and spin down 00:00:05

steps.title: Incubate the reaction for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction for 00:05:00 at Room temperature

steps.title: Store the prepared library On ice...
steps.instruction: Store the prepared library On ice until ready to load onto a flow cell.

steps.title: Load 20 ng sequencing library onto...
steps.instruction: Load 20 ng sequencing library onto a MinION flow cell (see ncov 2019 sequencing protocol, step 21 )

steps.title: Start the sequencing run using MinKNOW,...
steps.instruction: Start the sequencing run using MinKNOW, using SQK-PCS109 as the sample preparation protocol (see ncov 2019 sequencing protocol, step 22 )

steps.title: Analyse the run results using RAMPART (see https://artic
steps.instruction: Analyse the run results using RAMPART (see https://artic.network/ncov-2019/ncov2019-using-rampart.html )

steps.title: Break swab and place into the prepared 1
steps.instruction: Break swab and place into the prepared 1.5 mL tube with lysis buffer to remove the outer viral shell and release RNA.

steps.title: Vortex tube for 00:00:30 , then...
steps.instruction: Vortex tube for 00:00:30 , then incubate tube at 60 °C for 00:10:00, [10-30 mins] to inactivate viral proteins.
